# Harvard Admission Data (Generated)

> 本页由最小 MVP 链路生成，用于证明 Harvard Admission Data 已可承接真实官方样本。

## 1. 本次接入的真实官方样本（最近一年抓取）

| Source ID | 类型 | 标题 | 链接 |
|-----------|------|------|------|
| source-harvard-2026-007 | statistics | Harvard Admissions Statistics (Class of 2029) | https://college.harvard.edu/admissions/admissions-statistics |
| source-harvard-2026-006 | requirements | Harvard Application Requirements | https://college.harvard.edu/admissions/apply/application-requirements |
| source-harvard-2026-005 | timeline | Harvard Application Timeline | https://college.harvard.edu/admissions/apply/application-timeline |

## 2. 当前最小结构化结果

| Field | Value | Source |
|------|-------|--------|
| Applicants | 47893 | source-harvard-2026-007 |
| Admitted | 2003 | source-harvard-2026-007 |
| Enrolling | 1675 | source-harvard-2026-007 |
| Waitlist Admits | 75 | source-harvard-2026-007 |
| First-generation share | 20% | source-harvard-2026-007 |
| Intended engineering share | 25% | source-harvard-2026-007 |
| REA deadline | November 1 | source-harvard-2026-005 |
| RD deadline | January 1 | source-harvard-2026-005 |
| REA notification window | mid-December | source-harvard-2026-005 |
| RD notification window | end of March | source-harvard-2026-005 |
| Testing policy | SAT or ACT required; exceptional alternatives listed when tests are inaccessible. | source-harvard-2026-006 |
| Teacher recommendations | Two teacher recommendations in different academic subjects. | source-harvard-2026-006 |

## 3. 当前阶段说明
- 这是最小验收样本，不追求字段完备。
- 目标是证明：official raw → source registry → processed yaml → wiki page 已打通。
- 如需继续扩展，可在同一 schema 下增加更多 cycle 或更多字段。
